name: safesips-realtime-map
description: SafeSips real-time privacy-preserving location sharing map (web + mobile + shared backend).

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n shared,server,web -c gray,cyan,green "npm:dev:shared" "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @safesips/server && npm run build -w @safesips/web
